_comment_repo_root: Absolute path to your React Native monorepo root (supports ~/). Required.
_comment_jira_base_url: Base URL for your JIRA instance. Required for JIRA integration.
_comment_jira_email: JIRA account email. Required for Cloud auth mode, unused for Data Center.
_comment_jira_token: JIRA API token (Cloud) or Personal Access Token (Data Center).
_comment_auth_mode: Authentication mode: 'cloud' (Basic Auth) or 'datacenter' (Bearer PAT). Default: cloud.
_comment_jira_project_prefix: JIRA project key prefix used in branch names (e.g., PROJ for PROJ-1234). Default: UMP.
_comment_app_title: Title shown in the dashboard header. Default: RN Dash.
_comment_claude_flags: Flags passed when launching Claude Code. Default: --dangerously-skip-permissions.
